scenarios.description: search(term) returns empty list when term not in index (B0 branch-false)
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex instance with no added movies

scenarios.description: search(term) returns single result when one document contains term (B0 branch-true, loop-1, movie!=null)
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex idx with one movie added containing term "apple"
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list size is 1 and result.docId equals the added movie's id

scenarios.description: search(term) skips index entries when movie missing in movies map (B0 branch-true, loop-1, movie==null)
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex idx; manually insert index entry idx.index.put("ghost",Map.of(99,1)); ensure idx.movies does not contain key 99

scenarios.description: search(term) returns sorted results for multiple documents (B0 branch-true, loop-N>1, movie!=null)
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex idx with two movies added: doc1 frequency 2, doc2 frequency 1 for term "star"
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list size is 2 and results.get(0).getRelevanceScore() >= results.get(1).getRelevanceScore();

scenarios.description: search(null) throws NullPointerException due to term.toLowerCase()
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex idx with or without movies
